proposal_structure.title: Cover
proposal_structure.content: Company logo, client name, project address, date. Dark forest-green cover with leaf motif.

proposal_structure.title: About Us
proposal_structure.content: Founder name, years in business, license number, insurance confirmation, 2-3 key differentiators. No more than 150 words.

proposal_structure.title: What We Heard
proposal_structure.content: 3-4 bullet points restating the client's stated goals in their own language. Shows listening. No fluff.

proposal_structure.title: Our Approach
proposal_structure.content: How we will tackle this specific project. References the 3-step process. No generic copy.

proposal_structure.title: Investment
proposal_structure.content: Line-item estimate: labor, materials, cleanup. Subtotals. Optional: payment schedule. Clean table layout.

proposal_structure.title: Our Work
proposal_structure.content: 3-4 before/after project photos with city and service type labels. Proof over promises.

proposal_structure.title: What Clients Say
proposal_structure.content: 2-3 Google reviews, full text. Star rating. Reviewer first name and neighborhood.

proposal_structure.title: Next Steps
proposal_structure.content: How to accept: call, email, or sign. Timeline for project start after acceptance. Deposit terms.
